project.name: NACRE//ORCHID
project.thesis: A luxury generative-art and design-system platform where pearl, orchid, lace, abalone, opal, labradorite, and gold cloisonne become product architecture, motion grammar, symbolic UX, and responsive storytelling.
project.governing_law: Make the site feel like opal, but architect it like a newsroom.

process.name: Semantic Map
process.pass_condition: every major motif has a UI assignment

process.name: Token Atlas
process.pass_condition: tokens map to components and states

process.name: Screen System
process.pass_condition: each screen has a primary action

process.name: Motion Effects
process.pass_condition: each effect has semantic purpose and fallback

process.name: Launch Case Study
process.pass_condition: story, offer, proof, and docs complete
